stemHtml: Which of the following calculations would be equal to the amount of trip fuel required?

options.a: Take-off, climb (including step climb), cruise, descent, approach and landing.
options.b: Take-off, climb (including step climb), cruise, contingency, descent, approach and landing.
options.c: Take-off, climb (including step climb), discretionary, descent, approach and landing.
options.d: Taxi, take-off, climb (including step climb), cruise, contingency, alternate, descent, approach and landing.
